results.title: House Passes $57M Energy Loan for Mount Coffee's Solar Generation
results.description: 42 House members ratify $57 million loan for solar and battery storage project at Mount Coffee Hydropower Plant in Liberia, aiming to enhance energy security and grid stability.

results.title: LEO Broadband Satellites in Serious Danger of Making Telescopes Obsolete
results.description: Astronomy is under threat like never before. A significant new study, which was conducted by astronomers from the European Southern Observatory (ESO), has warned that if the number of satellites in Earth’s orbit exceeds 100,000 (i.e. those with below naked eye visibility) then the human race may lose its ability observe the night sky with [...]

results.title: Is Westside The New Zudio? Bernstein Maps Trent's Expansion Sprint
results.description: Bernstein cuts Trent's target to Rs 3,500 but keeps its Outperform call, arguing Westside's surprise 50-stores-a-year guidance deserves a fresh look after years of Zudio stealing the spotlight.
